# Introduction

## Background on Data

This report uses the *gapminder* dataset, which has columns that include:

* country
* continent
* year
* lifeExp
* pop
* gdpPercap

## Background on Methods
```{r load-ggplot2}
library("ggplot2")
```
```{r read-gapminder-data}
gapminder <- read.csv("gapminder.csv")
```
```{r make-plot}
plot(lifeExp ~ year, data = gapminder)
```
